mapper.sql: id, gateway_code gatewayCode, gateway_name gatewayName, install_location installLocation, gateway_ip gatewayIp, mac_address macAddress, access_protocol accessProtocol, managed_device_count managedDeviceCount, firmware_version firmwareVersion, status, last_heartbeat_time lastHeartbeatTime, remark, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_edge_gateway
and gateway_code like concat('%', #{gatewayCode}, '%')
and gateway_name like concat('%', #{gatewayName}, '%')
and install_location like concat('%', #{installLocation}, '%')
and gateway_ip like concat('%', #{gatewayIp}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by status asc, id desc

select
from t_edge_gateway where gateway_code = #{gatewayCode} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into t_edge_gateway (gateway_code, gateway_name, install_location, gateway_ip, mac_address, access_protocol, managed_device_count, firmware_version, status, last_heartbeat_time, remark, create_date, update_date) values (#{gatewayCode}, #{gatewayName}, #{installLocation}, #{gatewayIp}, #{macAddress}, #{accessProtocol}, #{managedDeviceCount}, #{firmwareVersion}, #{status}, #{lastHeartbeatTime}, #{remark}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update t_edge_gateway set gateway_code = #{gatewayCode}, gateway_name = #{gatewayName}, install_location = #{installLocation}, gateway_ip = #{gatewayIp}, mac_address = #{macAddress}, access_protocol = #{accessProtocol}, managed_device_count = #{managedDeviceCount}, firmware_version = #{firmwareVersion}, status = #{status}, last_heartbeat_time = #{lastHeartbeatTime}, remark = #{remark}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
